title: UnderDasea
description: A mod that aims to add life to the oceans.
body:
UnderDaSea is a mod aiming to upgrade the existing oceans and more by adding more progression for the player as well as new mobs and biodiversity. 



**[ COMPATIBLE WITH ENCHANTMENT DESCRIPTION AND JUST ENOUGH EFFECT DESCRIPTIONS ]**
**YOU NEED TO INSTALL GECKOLIB AND JEI IS HIGHLY ADVISED**

[ IN 2 LANGUAGES: FRENCH AND ENGLISH ]



It adds 4 new biomes. 



The Jungle Swamp



 The Jungle Swamp is a mix of the swamp and jungle biome. Two specifics mobs spawn there: The pirhana and the firefly. 

![The Jungle Swamp](https://i.ibb.co/CvzR5c6/2023-09-12-19-32-31.png)



The Deep Dark Ocean



The Deep Dark Ocean is a variation of the ocean but darker, more gloomy. In this ocean full of sculk like blocks, you will find an horrifying creature named the Sea Lamp Fish. However, this biome keep some good treasures. Who knows, maybe the lampfish keep the key to this treasure ?

![The deep dark ocean](https://i.ibb.co/BKPWHcd/2024-04-16-19-50-20.png)

The Dead Ocean



The Dead Ocean is not somewhere you want to swim. Dead plants, toxic creatures, dangerous blocks. Who knows what happened here? There's even that little fella named the Red Fish with its cute 3 eyes... How cute!



Just a thing... You might explode!
![The thunder ocean](https://i.ibb.co/rZ38p74/2024-04-13-00-42-33.png)


The Thunder Ocean



The most dangerous biome of the mod. In this biome, cursed with lightening, you can get strike by any minutes. While you need to take precautions, you will find some cool oil rigs like structures and very cool stuff in it. In this biome, lightening can be a good material. In addition, these lightening could give you a curse, or a benediction... 

(Note: This is a pre-alpha version, in the release, there are not that many towers in the biome)



It adds also new underwater creatures such as jellyfishes in 3 different sizes, sword fishes, piranhas, red fishes, ray manta, blob fishes, eels and more to come. 

![New mobs](https://i.ibb.co/DMJYkF4/2024-04-14-15-09-432222222.png)

It adds new biodiversity such as sea orchins, starfishes, new underwater plants...

5 new discs. 



The Fish Net.

The fish net is a net you put underwater. It catches fish, trash and even treasures! You can upgrade your net with some upgrades such as the Lapis-Lazuli Upgrade, the Gold Upgrade, the Diamond and more.

You can also upgrade the fish net with a block of netherite. You can fish faster, more fishes with more upgrades.





New underwater nature such as: starfishes, orchins, corals.

 

Overall of some vanilla mechanics:

      --- The Elder Guardian:

The elder guardian now drops a heart, usable to craft some epic items! 

The elder guardian has now 2 phases. When entering the second phase, at 25% of its lives, it will summon lot of guardians to protect itself.

     --- The beaches

Did the beaches seemed empty? Welcome the palm trees, snake burrows and the beach rocks!

     --- Squid Tentacles

Yummy squid can now be eaten.



Not convinced yet?

Download the mod and test it for youself :)
